'''Domb Treetor''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] from [[Skako/Legends|Skako]], served as a Appropriations Chief with the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] prior to the formation of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, Treetor became a [[Major/Legends|Major]] in the [[Confederacy military/Legends|Confederacy military]].

==Biography==
During the Clone Wars, Treetor commanded a [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|grand army]] of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], but despite his power, he was defeated at the [[Battle of Bassadro]] by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Empatojayos Brand]] and his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. Major Treetor had hoped to hold [[Bassadro]]'s mineral wealth for the CIS, but was forced to surrender to General Brand and return the planet's holdings back to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

News of Treetor's surrender was broadcast on Republic [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] channels, though the Separatists were quick to ensure reporters knew the 'true' reason for the Major's surrender—supposedly, Domb Treetor surrendered to Brand only to save the citizens of [[Agao]] and other nearby settlements from further warfare.

==Appearances==
